name: Joe Daley
description: American educator, jazz musician, composer and arranger who plays tuba, trombone and euphonium
abstract: Joseph Peter Daley (August 6, 1949 – August 3, 2025) was an American educator, jazz musician, composer and arranger known for his work with the tuba, trombone and euphonium.

interviews.title: Joseph Daley interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, March 18, 2018

concerts.label: Midnight Performance: Newport Jazz Festival: Sam Rivers Quartet and Orchestra

works.t: The Living Lives Not Among The Dead.  Why Seek It There?

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: Joe Daley. Either one of those two guys. ... Vincent Chancey, he was even in my band when we sang. ... Joe Daley would be singing!
about_quotes.doc_title: Bley Carla — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
